testcase.name: test_dashboard_stats
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_qa_pass.py:92: in test_dashboard_stats assert "total_orders" in data or "orders" in data E AssertionError: assert ('total_orders' in {'bug_reports_count': 0, 'delivered_count': 0, 'feature_requests_count': 0, 'in_progress_count': 0, ...} or 'orders' in {'bug_reports_count': 0, 'delivered_count': 0, 'feature_requests_count': 0, 'in_progress_count': 0, ...})

testcase.name: test_dashboard_recent_orders
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_qa_pass.py:98: in test_dashboard_recent_orders assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_order
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_full_qa_pass.py:124: in test_create_order assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Create order failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Create order failed: {"detail":[{"type":"literal_error","loc":["body","priority"],"msg":"Input should be 'Low', 'Normal', 'High' or 'Urgent'","input":"medium","ctx":{"expected":"'Low', 'Normal', 'High' or 'Urgent'"},"url":"https://errors.pydantic.dev/2.12/v/literal_error"}]} E assert 422 in [200, 201] E + where 422 = <Response [422]>.status_code
